result.stdout:
jsonmerge:
  Merge json files

Usage:
  jsonmerge [options] <input-files>...

Arguments:
  <input-files>    Two or more JSON files to be merged

Options:
  -o, --output, --output-file <o>    Output file path
  -f, --force                        Override output file if it already exists
  --version                          Display version information

commands.payload:
jsonmerge:
  Merge json files

Usage:
  jsonmerge [options] <input-files>...

Arguments:
  <input-files>    Two or more JSON files to be merged

Options:
  -o, --output, --output-file <o>    Output file path
  -f, --force                        Override output file if it already exists
  --version                          Display version information
